title.source: Language and translation options on your platform
title.target: Language and translation options on your platform

body:0001.source: What are language options on the platform?
body:0001.target: What are language options on the platform?

body:0002.source: Understand how language settings shape the user experience and make your platform accessible to multilingual communities.
body:0002.target: Understand how language settings shape the user experience and make your platform accessible to multilingual communities.

body:0003.source: Your platform can support multiple languages. You control:
body:0003.target: Your platform can support multiple languages. You control:

body:0004.source: The default platform language shown to first-time visitors.
body:0004.target: The default platform language shown to first-time visitors.

body:0005.source: The languages users can choose to interact with.
body:0005.target: The languages users can choose to interact with.

body:0006.source: Whether content is translated manually or through automatic translation tools.
body:0006.target: Whether content is translated manually or through automatic translation tools.

body:0007.source: Supporting multiple languages helps you engage a broader audience, improve inclusivity, and increase participation.
body:0007.target: Supporting multiple languages helps you engage a broader audience, improve inclusivity, and increase participation.

body:0009.source: Contact support via the chat bubble on your platform.
body:0009.target: Contact support via the chat bubble on your platform.

body:0010.source: Access depends on your subscription plan.
body:0010.target: Access depends on your subscription plan.

body:0012.source: Weglot: Translates the entire frontend UI and user-generated content.
body:0012.target: Weglot: Translates the entire frontend UI and user-generated content.

body:0013.source: Google Translate: Translates only ideas and comments.
body:0013.target: Google Translate: Translates only ideas and comments.

body:0015.source: Weglot is an add-on that auto-translates everything on your platform’s interface.
body:0015.target: Weglot is an add-on that auto-translates everything on your platform’s interface.

body:0016.source: A language switcher appears in the bottom-left of the screen.
body:0016.target: A language switcher appears in the bottom-left of the screen.

body:0017.source: Weglot translates all visible content (UI, posts, project titles, etc.).
body:0017.target: Weglot translates all visible content (UI, posts, project titles, etc.).

body:0018.source: Supports up to 3 languages by default (extendable to 10 upon agreement).
body:0018.target: Supports up to 3 languages by default (extendable to 10 upon agreement).

body:0020.source: To link directly to a specific language version, append ?lang=xx to any URL.
body:0020.target: To link directly to a specific language version, append ?lang=xx to any URL.

body:0023.source: ℹ️ The language must already be configured in Weglot for the link to work.
body:0023.target: ℹ️ The language must already be configured in Weglot for the link to work.

body:0025.source: Google translate is a lightweight translation of ideas, comments, and proposals without translating the full interface.
body:0025.target: Google translate is a lightweight translation of ideas, comments, and proposals without translating the full interface.

body:0028.source: Ideas and project input: also via "Translate" option
body:0028.target: Ideas and project input: also via "Translate" option

body:0031.source: Does not translate admin content or project descriptions.
body:0031.target: Does not translate admin content or project descriptions.

body:0032.source: Assumes the user writes in their chosen default language — it won't detect and translate mismatched input.
body:0032.target: Assumes the user writes in their chosen default language — it won't detect and translate mismatched input.

body:0033.source: Does not support automatic translation of user profile language mismatches.
body:0033.target: Does not support automatic translation of user profile language mismatches.

body:0034.source: To fix incorrect or incomplete translations:
body:0034.target: To fix incorrect or incomplete translations:

body:0036.source: Use the language toggle to enter your own version in other languages.
body:0036.target: Use the language toggle to enter your own version in other languages.

body:0037.source: How to change the default language ?
body:0037.target: How to change the default language ?

body:0039.source: Make sure your preferred default language appears at the first language, on the far left of the language boxes.
body:0039.target: Make sure your preferred default language appears at the first language, on the far left of the language boxes.

body:0040.source: To adjust, drag or delete other languages until the correct one is in the first position.
body:0040.target: To adjust, drag or delete other languages until the correct one is in the first position.

body:0041.source: The default language determines the first impression visitors receive, and the base language used for account registration.
body:0041.target: The default language determines the first impression visitors receive, and the base language used for account registration.

body:0042.source: How to add a new language?
body:0042.target: How to add a new language?

body:0044.source: Click the dropdown arrow to view the full list of available languages.
body:0044.target: Click the dropdown arrow to view the full list of available languages.

body:0045.source: Select the languages you want to add.
body:0045.target: Select the languages you want to add.

body:0047.source: Adding a language does NOT auto-translate content, multiple languages need to be maintained manually
body:0047.target: Adding a language does NOT auto-translate content, multiple languages need to be maintained manually

body:0048.source: When publishing a project: You must enter a translated title for each added language (required to publish). Descriptions can be added per language but are not required to publish, though strongly recommended.
body:0048.target: When publishing a project: You must enter a translated title for each added language (required to publish). Descriptions can be added per language but are not required to publish, though strongly recommended.

body:0049.source: You cannot hide a project in specific languages. All added platform languages will show the project, even if translations are missing.
body:0049.target: You cannot hide a project in specific languages. All added platform languages will show the project, even if translations are missing.

body:0051.source: Each user controls their own platform language preference.
body:0051.target: Each user controls their own platform language preference.

body:0052.source: The language a user registers with becomes their default platform language.
body:0052.target: The language a user registers with becomes their default platform language.

body:0053.source: Users can change their preferred language anytime by clicking on their profile > My Settings > Language.
body:0053.target: Users can change their preferred language anytime by clicking on their profile > My Settings > Language.

body:0054.source: This preference affects the UI and how auto-translation is applied to ideas/comments.
body:0054.target: This preference affects the UI and how auto-translation is applied to ideas/comments.
